steps.title: Identify the subject and verb position
steps.content: The subject is frameworks (plural noun phrase), the blank is where the main verb goes, and this is an independent clause with a direct object.

steps.title: Match the verb to the subject
steps.content: A verb must agree in number with its subject. Underlie is the plural form required for the plural subject frameworks. The other three choices are all singular verb forms that violate subject-verb agreement. That matches choice C — C is correct.
